chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.68 of 2021 Zafar Hasan Khan Versus Habib Bank Ltd. Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection/reply ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 20.02.2024 Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed for appellant along with appellant in person. Ms. Afsheen Aman for respondent. -.-.- Learned counsel for the appellant, on instructions, does not press this appeal, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge
